'''D'pur''' was the seventh [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[C'rel]] in the [[N'zoth system/Legends|N'zoth system]] within the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. It was the only [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] in the system.<ref name="TEA" />

*<!-- 2003-01-XX -->''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'' {{1stm}}
